message:
fix: also strip tui from default features in CI

The prior sed step removed the tui feature definition but left "tui"
in the default features list, causing Cargo.toml parsing to fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,6 +26,7 @@ jobs:
           # ftui crates use /dp/frankentui/ paths unavailable in CI; strip them
           sed -i '/^ftui.*=.*{.*path.*=.*"\/dp\//d' Cargo.toml
           sed -i '/^tui = \["dep:ftui/d' Cargo.toml
+          sed -i 's/, "tui"//g' Cargo.toml
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
         with:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
@@ -45,6 +46,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           sed -i '/^ftui.*=.*{.*path.*=.*"\/dp\//d' Cargo.toml
           sed -i '/^tui = \["dep:ftui/d' Cargo.toml
+          sed -i 's/, "tui"//g' Cargo.toml
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Run unit tests
@@ -71,6 +73,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           sed -i '/^ftui.*=.*{.*path.*=.*"\/dp\//d' Cargo.toml
           sed -i '/^tui = \["dep:ftui/d' Cargo.toml
+          sed -i 's/, "tui"//g' Cargo.toml
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Run integration tests
@@ -93,6 +96,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           sed -i '/^ftui.*=.*{.*path.*=.*"\/dp\//d' Cargo.toml
           sed -i '/^tui = \["dep:ftui/d' Cargo.toml
+          sed -i 's/, "tui"//g' Cargo.toml
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Run proof harness
@@ -119,6 +123,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           sed -i '/^ftui.*=.*{.*path.*=.*"\/dp\//d' Cargo.toml
           sed -i '/^tui = \["dep:ftui/d' Cargo.toml
+          sed -i 's/, "tui"//g' Cargo.toml
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       # TUI tests skipped — tui feature requires local-path frankentui crates
@@ -147,6 +152,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           sed -i '/^ftui.*=.*{.*path.*=.*"\/dp\//d' Cargo.toml
           sed -i '/^tui = \["dep:ftui/d' Cargo.toml
+          sed -i 's/, "tui"//g' Cargo.toml
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Build release binary
@@ -178,6 +184,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           sed -i '/^ftui.*=.*{.*path.*=.*"\/dp\//d' Cargo.toml
           sed -i '/^tui = \["dep:ftui/d' Cargo.toml
+          sed -i 's/, "tui"//g' Cargo.toml
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Run stress tests
@@ -200,6 +207,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           sed -i '/^ftui.*=.*{.*path.*=.*"\/dp\//d' Cargo.toml
           sed -i '/^tui = \["dep:ftui/d' Cargo.toml
+          sed -i 's/, "tui"//g' Cargo.toml
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Run artifact contract tests
@@ -231,6 +239,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           sed -i '/^ftui.*=.*{.*path.*=.*"\/dp\//d' Cargo.toml
           sed -i '/^tui = \["dep:ftui/d' Cargo.toml
+          sed -i 's/, "tui"//g' Cargo.toml
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - name: Collect provenance
         run: |

@@ -49,6 +49,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           sed -i '/^ftui.*=.*{.*path.*=.*"\/dp\//d' Cargo.toml
           sed -i '/^tui = \["dep:ftui/d' Cargo.toml
+          sed -i 's/, "tui"//g' Cargo.toml
